$schema: v2 memory extraction corpus — drives the M1 gate-chain bake-off. Each case is a single user utterance plus the expected gate-chain outcome on a hand-crafted candidate. Names use pop-culture characters per CLAUDE.md mock-data rule. Populated 2026-04-11 (M1) — 130 cases across should_write / should_not_write / ambiguous / multi_clause buckets.

case_schema.candidate: object — subject/predicate/value/source_text, the candidate the extractor would produce
case_schema.intent: string|null — decomposer intent label, null when not used

expect.should_write: boolean — true if the gate chain should accept
expect.denied_by_gate: string|null — clause_shape | subject | predicate | schema | intent
expect.immediate_durable: boolean — should the predicate bypass promotion
expect.single_value: boolean — should new value supersede old
